choices: Teach IDE workflow literacy before free practice in the public simulator

items.prompt: A typical IDE session includes which pane set?
choices: Files, Hierarchy, Signals, Wave, and Console
items.explain: Those five panes are the tour map for this course.

items.prompt: Deep language and offline-sim fidelity belong mainly in sibling courses like learn_verilog, learn_iverilog, and learn_verilator.
